summary: Fixed lost-update race condition in persistEvents by moving read-merge-write inside the serialized write queue. Previously, callers read stale existingEvents outside the queue, so concurrent writers overwrote each other's events.
notes: persistEvents now reads fresh file state inside _writePromise queue. Falls back to caller existingEvents only when file does not exist. Regression test verifies 5 concurrent persists preserve all 5 events. Public API signature unchanged. Wave 6 audit finding (Score 23).
